name: Lithrone G29 with Komori G429 HUV 4 Colour Offset Press
shortDesc: High-speed, high-efficiency 4-color offset press featuring advanced H-UV curing.
image: images/Lithrone G29 Komori G429 HUV 4 Colour Offset Press.png
fullDesc: Delivers exceptional print quality with instant drying capabilities using innovative H-UV technology. Engineered for high productivity and quick turnaround times on a wide variety of stocks, from thin sheets to heavy cardstock.
howItWorks: Utilizes a 4-color offset printing process integrated with an eco-friendly H-UV inline curing system that instantly dries the ink using specific UV wavelengths.

name: Kodak Q800 Plate Making System
shortDesc: High-precision Computer-to-Plate technology for offset printing preparation.
fullDesc: The Kodak Q800 Plate Making System converts digital artwork directly into printing plates with exceptional accuracy and consistency. This technology improves print quality, reduces setup time, and ensures reliable production for commercial printing projects.
howItWorks: Computer-to-Plate (CtP) imaging transfers digital files onto plates using precise exposure and development processes.

name: AccurioPress C4070 Digital Printing System
shortDesc: Professional digital color printing for premium commercial applications.
fullDesc: The AccurioPress C4070 delivers vibrant colors, sharp details, and high-speed production. It is ideal for brochures, invitations, catalogs, marketing materials, and customized print jobs.
howItWorks: High-speed digital electrophotographic printing with advanced color management and finishing options.

name: SC100 Z Cutting Machine
shortDesc: Precision cutting system for professional finishing.
fullDesc: Ensures clean edges, accurate dimensions, and consistent finishing across all printed materials including brochures, cards, books, and packaging products.
howItWorks: Automated cutting and trimming using precise Z-knife or programmable tooling.

name: Die-Cut Machine
shortDesc: Custom shape cutting for premium print products.
fullDesc: Creates unique shapes and designs for invitations, packaging boxes, labels, folders, and specialty print materials.
howItWorks: Die tooling presses shapes into substrates to produce custom contours and forms.

name: Knife Grinding Machine
shortDesc: Maintains cutting blade accuracy and performance.
fullDesc: Used for sharpening industrial cutting blades to ensure precision cutting, reduced wastage, and consistent production quality.
howItWorks: Precision grinding restores blade geometry and sharpness for high-quality cuts.

name: Micro Bond Lamination Machine
shortDesc: Protective lamination for durability and premium appearance.
fullDesc: Applies protective laminate coatings to printed products, enhancing durability, moisture resistance, and visual appeal.
howItWorks: Roll-to-roll lamination with heat and pressure for even coating application.
